title: Watchdog auto-restart re-armed the Stage-2 sleeve and RE-BOUGHT crypto mid-close (naive broker-close without the intentional-stop flag)
source: LIVE R1 2026-06-22: while manually flattening crypto, the watchdog auto-restart supervisor (B0176) relaunched run_survival_live from launch_cmd.json with the Stage-2 sleeve still armed, RE-BUYING BTC/ETH/SOL mid-close. Observed directly during the incident; tied to the same overnight chaos as the equity-lock flatten failures (B0211).
why: Root cause: the service was killed WITHOUT the watchdog intentional-stop flag (signals/watchdog/service_stopped.flag), so decide_restart() did not treat the stop as intentional and the supervisor relaunched the EXACT persisted argv (launch_cmd.json, B0176) — which still carried --stage2-lambda/--lottery-arm — re-arming the sleeve and re-entering crypto in the middle of a manual flatten. A naive close-at-broker is therefore NOT durable: reconcile() takes the union of held+targeted assets and re-buys anything whose target is non-zero. Secondary: even a survival-ONLY service (Stage-2 off, --crypto-var-cap 0) FLATTENS a manual crypto buy because crypto's target is 0 and reconcile() sells off-target.
value_rationale: Unmanaged re-entry of a leveraged crypto bet during a manual de-risk is a direct S13/S14 and rank-integrity hazard in the live contest. The fix makes the safe-stop UNSKIPPABLE so the incident cannot recur from either launcher.
scope: DONE (commit 9e38baf): promote scratchpad SELL_CRYPTO_NOW.py -> scripts/flatten_crypto_safe.py with the canonical safe-stop baked in as an unskippable precondition: set the intentional-stop flag -> survival_stop.bat -> verify the service is DOWN (abort otherwise) -> flatten only crypto -> final verify no service re-appeared (loud abort if it did).
DONE: add the inverse scripts/buy_crypto_now.py (S14-safe manual long, capped at LAMBDA_MAX 2.099, passed through section14_safe_lambda; aborts if a live service is already managing crypto).

DONE: shared pure logic in scripts/crypto_manual.py + tests/test_crypto_manual.py (sizing/chunking/S14, incl. the guarantee the produced safe lambda is not force-liquidated by the worst-case move it was sized against).

DONE (commit cce7e02): scripts/survival_run_flat.bat resumes the FX/metals book flat-crypto (--crypto-var-cap 0.0, no stage2 flags) so the re-persisted launch_cmd.json also comes up flat-crypto -> the sleeve-re-arm cannot recur from this launch.
DONE (commit 804eebf): buy_crypto_now abort message corrected to the real reconcile() mechanism.
recommendation: Closed by the 2026-06-22 ops hardening (9e38baf + cce7e02 + 804eebf). The durable rule: never kill the service without the intentional-stop flag; use flatten_crypto_safe.py for any manual crypto de-risk; to HOLD a manual buy, stop the service first or arm Stage-2 so it holds crypto S14-safe.
out_of_scope: The equity-lock chunked-close fix (B0211) and the lambda-floor/CLI reconciliation (B0212) — sibling Jun-22 live-incident fixes tracked separately.
